mapper.select:
SELECT d.dept_code, d.dept_name, d.dept_tel, d.dept_address AS dept_loc, d.dept_mgr AS dept_mgr, CASE WHEN e.emp_no IS NOT NULL THEN e.emp_name || '(' || e.emp_no || ')' WHEN d.dept_mgr IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(d.dept_mgr) ELSE NULL END AS dept_mgr_display, d.dept_del_status AS dept_gubun, d.reg_date, TO_CHAR(d.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS str_in_date FROM dept d LEFT JOIN emp e ON e.emp_no = d.dept_mgr AND e.emp_del_status = 0 WHERE d.dept_del_status = 0
AND ( TO_CHAR(d.dept_code) LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' OR d.dept_name LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' )
ORDER BY d.dept_code

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dept WHERE dept_del_status = 0
AND ( TO_CHAR(dept_code) LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR dept_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )

SELECT d.dept_code, d.dept_name, d.dept_tel, d.dept_address AS dept_loc, d.dept_mgr AS dept_mgr, CASE WHEN e.emp_no IS NOT NULL THEN e.emp_name || '(' || e.emp_no || ')' WHEN d.dept_mgr IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(d.dept_mgr) ELSE NULL END AS dept_mgr_display, d.dept_del_status AS dept_gubun, d.reg_date, TO_CHAR(d.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS str_in_date FROM dept d LEFT JOIN emp e ON e.emp_no = d.dept_mgr AND e.emp_del_status = 0 WHERE d.dept_code = #{value} AND d.dept_del_status = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dept ( dept_code, dept_name, dept_tel, dept_address, dept_mgr, dept_del_status, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{dept_code}, #{dept_name}, #{dept_tel}, #{dept_loc}, #{dept_mgr}, 0, #{reg_emp_no}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE dept SET dept_name = #{dept_name}, dept_tel = #{dept_tel}, dept_address = #{dept_loc}, dept_mgr = #{dept_mgr}, dept_del_status = #{dept_gubun} WHERE dept_code = #{dept_code}
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(candidate_dept_code) FROM ( SELECT 10000 + (LEVEL - 1) * 500 AS candidate_dept_code FROM dual CONNECT BY 10000 + (LEVEL - 1) * 500 <= 99999 ) WHERE candidate_dept_code NOT IN ( SELECT dept_code FROM dept )
SELECT emp_no, emp_name, dept_code, emp_grade FROM emp WHERE emp_del_status = 0 AND emp_grade = 3 ORDER BY emp_name
